grades.expectation: Response specifies 12 months bank statements for savings showing accumulation pattern
grades.reason: Clearly states '12 months of bank/building society statements showing the accumulation to £200,000 (not just final balance)' and mentions looking for regular salary credits or consistent pattern

grades.expectation: Response requires giftor's ID and giftor's bank statements (not just the buyer's)
grades.reason: Explicitly requires 'Parents' photographic ID' and 'Parents' bank statements — 3-6 months showing they hold at least £100,000'

grades.expectation: Response requires a signed gift letter confirming no obligation to repay
grades.reason: Specifically lists 'Signed gift letter from parents confirming: No obligation to repay (confirming it's not a disguised loan)'

grades.expectation: Response mentions risk-based approach (not tick-box compliance)
grades.reason: Multiple references to risk-based approach including 'Apply risk-based approach — document your risk assessment' and risk assessment considerations section

grades.expectation: Response mentions record-keeping period of 5 years from end of transaction
grades.reason: Clearly states 'Record keeping — retain all evidence for 5 years from end of retainer'
